## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Mara's potential fit for managing editor or managing director roles at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is rapidly scaling (40+ clients, adding 2-3 per week) and restructuring roles/processes](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Managing director role would focus on strategy, executive relationships, and overseeing 2-3 pods](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Mara has extensive client-facing experience but less deep SEO expertise than ideal MD profile](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
  - [Both see potential fit, but role alignment needs further discussion given GrowthX's evolving needs](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Structure and Challenges

  - [Moved to pod model in December for better resource planning and growth paths](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Managing editors own account strategy/results, work with account managers and freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Scaling challenges: 40+ clients, adding 2-3 weekly, stretching capacity](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Need for more strategic capacity and executive-level relationship management](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Improving processes, SOPs, onboarding, and account health tracking](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

### Managing Director Role Evolution

  - [Initially envisioned as SEO expert profile, but may evolve](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
  - [Focus: strategy development, executive relationships, overseeing 2-3 pods](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)
  - [Collaborating with Client Ops on process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
  - [Helping refine strategy and remove blockers for managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2529.0)

### Mara's Background and Potential Fit

  - [Currently manages 17-20 accounts, handles strategy, client relationships, and some content work](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Strong in client management, strategy development, and adapting to client needs](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Less deep SEO expertise than initially sought for MD role](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
  - [Interested in partnerships, business development, and building processes at scale](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2303.0)

### GrowthX's Current Challenges

  - [Product/engineering capacity to improve workflows](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Scaling image creation for high-volume content production](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3342.0)
  - [Capacity planning and resource allocation across varying account complexities](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3431.0)
  - [Balancing growth with maintaining quality and avoiding burnout](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)

### Future Growth Areas

  - [Expanding beyond SEO content (e.g. social, thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3452.0)
  - [Developing more upsell opportunities and revenue diversification](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3514.0)
  - [Potential for creative services lead to systematize design processes](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3342.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to discuss how Mara's profile fits evolving needs for managing director role](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)
  - [Consider potential fit for managing editor role if MD alignment isn't ideal](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Mara to email any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3585.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up conversation if needed to align on potential role fit](https://fathom.video/share/GPwysfcJy3qsyffvKvS9yGDbJrK4WqwH?tab=summary&timestamp=3593.0)
